fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` is a struct that specifies arguments for creating a customized version of an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface>. It allows you to select a font from a TTC collection by index, choose a color palette, provide palette color overrides, and set variation axis positions for variable fonts.

Pass an `SKFontArguments` value to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)> to obtain a new typeface with the desired settings.

## Examples

```csharp
var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("NotoColorEmoji.ttf");

var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    PaletteIndex = 1,
    PaletteOverrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
    {
        new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = (uint)SKColors.Red }
    }
};

using var cloned = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies arguments for creating a customized <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with variation settings and palette options.

fields.value: The zero-based index of the typeface within a font collection (TTC).
fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the typeface within a font collection (TTC).

fields.value: The zero-based index of the color palette to use.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the color palette to use.

fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> entries to apply.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the palette color overrides to apply.

fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> entries specifying the axis values.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation axis coordinates for variable font rendering.
